languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

languages.text: "Да будет так, святой воин. Дитя благословенного Сангвиния более не с нами, но воздаяние за его смерть — в наших руках. Гнев Бога-Императора да падет на головы нечестивцев!"

"So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

"So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

"So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

languages.text: 「そうであろう。聖なる戦士よ。祝福されたサンギニウスの血を引く子供はもはや我々の側にはいない。だが、彼の死の報いは我々の手にあります。信仰を捨てた者たちの頭上に、神皇帝の怒りが降り注ぐであろう！」
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: 「そうであろう。聖なる戦士よ。祝福されたサンギニウスの血を引く子供はもはや我々の側にはいない。だが、彼の死の報いは我々の手にあります。信仰を捨てた者たちの頭上に、神皇帝の怒りが降り注ぐであろう！」

languages.text: « Qu'il en soit ainsi, guerrier saint. L'enfant de Sanguinius, béni soit-il, n'est plus parmi nous, mais nous avons entre nos mains les moyens d'obtenir une juste rétribution à sa mort. Les foudres de l'Empereur-Dieu s'abattront sur la tête des mécréants ! »
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: « Qu'il en soit ainsi, guerrier saint. L'enfant de Sanguinius, béni soit-il, n'est plus parmi nous, mais nous avons entre nos mains les moyens d'obtenir une juste rétribution à sa mort. Les foudres de l'Empereur-Dieu s'abattront sur la tête des mécréants ! »

languages.text: "So sei es, heiliger Krieger. Das Kind des gesegneten Sanguinius ist nicht mehr unter uns, aber die Vergeltung für seinen Tod liegt in unseren Händen. Der Zorn des Gottimperators wird über die Ungläubigen kommen!"
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: "So sei es, heiliger Krieger. Das Kind des gesegneten Sanguinius ist nicht mehr unter uns, aber die Vergeltung für seinen Tod liegt in unseren Händen. Der Zorn des Gottimperators wird über die Ungläubigen kommen!"

languages.text: "Öyle olsun kutsal savaşçı. Mübarek Sanguinius'un evladı artık aramızda olmasa da ölümünün kefareti ellerimizde. Tanrı İmparator'un gazabı, inançsızların tepesine binecek!"
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: "Öyle olsun kutsal savaşçı. Mübarek Sanguinius'un evladı artık aramızda olmasa da ölümünün kefareti ellerimizde. Tanrı İmparator'un gazabı, inançsızların tepesine binecek!"

languages.text: «Sea pues, sagrado guerrero. El hijo del bendito Sanguinius ya no está con nosotros, pero el deber de vengar su muerte recae en nuestras manos. ¡Que la cólera del Dios Emperador se desate sobre los infieles!».
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"

traits.locale_text: «Sea pues, sagrado guerrero. El hijo del bendito Sanguinius ya no está con nosotros, pero el deber de vengar su muerte recae en nuestras manos. ¡Que la cólera del Dios Emperador se desate sobre los infieles!».

languages.text: “那便如此吧，神圣的战士。受祝的圣吉列斯之子虽已离我们而去，但为他复仇的权柄此刻正握于我等手中。神皇之怒必将降临于不虔之人的头上！”
languages.original_text: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"
